summary: Excellent audience recording with tight bass and great stereo separation of a well‑known show
review: The reviewer praises Jim Vita’s Sennheiser field recording as “most excellent,” noting unusually tight low end and impressive stereo separation for an outdoor tape. While no specific musical moments are highlighted, the high‑quality capture makes this release stand out among other available versions of the concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, which is overwhelmingly positive about the recording but offers no insight on musical performance; rating reflects excellent audio quality tempered by lack of show‑specific evaluation.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bass is tight and well‑defined, stereo separation is strong despite outdoor challenges; overall clarity and balance praised.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or song performance were provided.
